query:
_index=sumologic_system_events "Health-Change"  {{{keywords}}}
| json field=_raw "status" 
//| json "eventType", "resourceIdentity.id" as eventType , resourceId 
| json field=_raw "details.error" as error
| json field=_raw "details.trackerId" as trackerid
| json field=_raw "resourceIdentity.name" as name
| json field=_raw "severityLevel" as severity
| sort _messagetime | count as events, first(_messagetime) as latest, first(status) as status by trackerid,name,error,severity
| sort latest | formatdate(latest,"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss ZZZ") as latest

variables.name: keywords
variables.values: *,// any search keywords,not installed* not filecollection*,budget
